song_name: As Good As I Once Was

versions.song_name: As Good As I Once Was
As Good As I Once Was
versions.version_description: This tab is my interpretation and is based off of Toby Keiths' performance for the Coalition troops in Bagdad a number of years back. If you wish, you can also play it with your CAPO 3 as it is played in the official video.

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: As Good As I Once Was

recommended.song_name: How Do You Like Me Now

content:
As Good As I Once Was
Toby Keith
Honkeytonk University
Transcribed by: Steven P.

[ch]F[/ch]      133211
[ch]Bb[/ch]     x13331
[ch]C[/ch]      x32010
[ch]Fsus[/ch]   133311
[ch]G[/ch]      320003
[ch]C7[/ch]     x32310
[ch]C/E[/ch]    032010
[ch]Dm[/ch]     xx0231
[ch]Gm[/ch]     355333
[ch]Bb/D[/ch]   x5333x
[ch]G7[/ch]     353433


[Intro]

[ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Fsus[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab]                            [ch]Bb[/ch]
She said, "I've seen you in here before."[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
I said, "I've been here a time or two."[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Bb[/ch]
She said, "Hello, my name is Bobby Jo.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
Meet my twin sister Betty Lou.[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Bb[/ch]
And we're both feeling kinda wild tonight.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
You're the only cowboy in this place.[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
And if you're up for a rodeo.[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]C7[/ch]
I'll put a big Texas smile on your face.”[/tab]

I said, "Girls,"


[Chorus 1]

[tab]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
I ain't as good as I once was[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
I got a few years on me now[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
But there was a time back in my prime[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]
When I could really lay it down[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
And if you need some love tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C/E[/ch]     [ch]Dm[/ch]
Then I might have just enough[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Gm[/ch]
I ain't as good as I once was[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
But I'm as good once as I ever was[/tab]


[Interlude]

[ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Fsus[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]


[Verse 2]

[tab]                         [ch]Bb[/ch]
I still hang out with my best friend Dave[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]F[/ch]
I’ve known him since we were kids at school[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
Last night he had a few shots[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]
Got in a tight spot hustlin' a game of pool[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
With a couple of redneck boys[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
One great big, bad biker man[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
I heard David yell across the room[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
"Hey buddy, how 'bout a helping hand."[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C7[/ch]
I said, "Dave,"[/tab]


[Chorus 2]

[tab]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
I ain't as good as I once was[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
My how the years have flown[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
But there was a time back in my prime[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]
When I could really hold my own[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
But if you wanna fight tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C/E[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
Guess those boys don't look all that tough[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Gm[/ch]
I ain't as good as I once was[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
But I'm as good once as I ever was[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]             [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]Bb/D[/ch]
I used to be hell on wheels[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
Back when I was younger man[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G7[/ch]
Now my body says, "You can't do this, boy."[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]C7[/ch]
But my pride says, "Oh, yes you can.”[/tab]


[Chorus 3]

[tab]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
I ain't as good as I once was[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
That’s just the cold, hard truth[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
I still throw a few back, talk a little smack[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]
When I'm feelin’ bullet proof[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
So don't double dog dare me now[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C/E[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch] 
'Cause I'd have to call your bluff[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Gm[/ch]
I ain't as good as I once was[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
But I'm as good once as I ever was[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bb[/ch]
May not be good as I once was[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch] 
But I'm as good once as I ever was[/tab]

[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Fsus[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]


This is my interpretation of the song and is what I hear. Since
U-G doesn't always include the correct chord voicings, I have
included all of them in this transcription. Please feel free to
experiment with your own chord voicings.
